_comment: Species: Immortal Celestial Body (仙天体) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Immortal Celestial Body

canonical.appearance: Celestial body 5 m, body radiates immortal light, eyes are star-wells
canonical.size: 5 m manifestation, 1000 jin; true form spans celestial-realms
canonical.behavior: Celestial-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing celestial-essence
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained immortal celestial body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: immortal_celestial_body_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
